{{CargoOrgan
|name=Chaotic Dragon Horn
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10705
|idx=63
|description="They say the horns of the Primordial Dragon tore through the Void, ringing like celestial bells across the fabric of creation…"
— Codex Draconis
|skill=Summon the Horn of Chaos, dealing DMG equal to 220% of ATK, and trigger explosion, dealing DMG equal to 16% of ATK for each stack of Annihilation the enemy has!
|hp=2318
|def=228
|atk=363
|rush=246
|gene1=When HP < 30%, Crit DMG REDUC +20%
|gene2=Per organ awakened, {race} ATK +7
Organs awakened: 40/40
|gene3=Earth DMG +120
|gene4=When HP is below 30%, CRIT DMG +20%
|gene5=For Round 1, CRIT DMG +20%
|gene6=In Snail Arena, CRIT DMG REDUC +20%
|gene7=Crit DMG +10% (Awakened)
|}}
